title: Property Consultant - Sobha Developers - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Sobha Developers - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
We at Sobha Developers are looking for an experienced Property Consultant based out of Faridabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Sobha Developers:
Sobha Developers is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sobha Developers!
